one_line_summary: Solid, complete implementation with atomic Lua scripts, property tests, and full adversarial suite pass; ADR and design doc are competent if not exhaustive.
strengths: Atomic Lua scripts for both algorithms; no TOCTOU; 100% adversarial pass
All components wired: 2 algorithms, 2 backends, decorator, ASGI middleware with spec headers
Real concurrency + hypothesis property tests asserting no over-grant
weaknesses: ADR is brief; only 2 rejected alternatives and clock-skew policy is somewhat hand-wavy
Middleware fail-open swallows all exceptions broadly; remaining=-1 header is non-standard
SW reset_ts/retry_after math uses last element rather than oldest-in-window in some paths
